metadata.description: Short identifier for the client (lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only). Resources will be named: cns-<clientName>-sentinel
Comma-separated list of connector IDs to enable. Remove any connector for which the client does not have the required licence.

resources.comments: User Assigned Managed Identity — runs the deployment script under a controlled identity.
resources.name: [variables('identityName')]

resources.comments: Grant Contributor on this resource group to the deployment identity.
resources.name: [variables('roleAssignmentName')]

resources.comments: Log Analytics Workspace — 90-day retention, pay-as-you-go, UK South.
resources.name: [variables('workspaceName')]

resources.comments: Install Microsoft Sentinel solution on the workspace.
resources.name: [concat('SecurityInsights(', variables('workspaceName'), ')')]

resources.comments: ARM Deployment Script - waits for RBAC propagation, then configures UEBA, the selected data connectors, and playbook permissions via the SecurityInsights REST API.
resources.name: [variables('scriptName')]
